seoTitle: Elk Grove Unified School District Calendar 2026-2027: Dates, Holidays & PDF
seoDescription: View the Elk Grove Unified School District 2026-2027 Traditional Calendar with the first and last day, holidays, breaks, student no-school dates, official PDF, and ICS download.
calendarNotes: This page covers the EGUSD Traditional Calendar only. Modified Traditional and A/B/C/D track dates are listed separately in the official PDF and may differ.

calendarFaqs.q: Is the EGUSD calendar download an official subscription?
calendarFaqs.a: No. The .ics file is an unofficial one-time import generated by MySchoolDates from the reviewed Traditional Calendar dates on this page. It will not automatically update if EGUSD revises the calendar, so always verify changes on the official EGUSD calendars page.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I find EGUSD Modified Traditional and A/B/C/D track dates?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the official EGUSD calendars page and the 2026-2027 calendar PDF to find Modified Traditional and A/B/C/D track dates.

yearNumbers.label: Calendar Tracks
yearNumbers.detail: The official EGUSD PDF includes Traditional, Modified Traditional, and A/B/C/D track calendars. This page summarizes the Traditional Calendar.

whatsNew.title: What's New for 2026-2027
content: The first day moves from August 14 in 2025-2026 to August 13 in 2026-2027.
The last day moves from May 29 in 2025-2026 to May 27 in 2026-2027.
Spring Break moves from March 16-20 in 2025-2026 to March 15-19 in 2026-2027.
